Class Menu

java.lang.Object
Menu
public class Menu extends Object
Item initialized to the data held at the Menu table in the database. Holds insertion and update methods.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    List<MenuItem>
    activeMenu
    List holding only items with the active status
    List<MenuItem>
    menu
    List holding all items in the menu

  • Field Details

    • menu

      public List<MenuItem> menu
      List holding all items in the menu

    • activeMenu

      public List<MenuItem> activeMenu
      List holding only items with the active status

  • Constructor Details

    • Menu

      public Menu(Connection connection)
      Given a databse connection. Initializes a list of menuitems representing the Menu database table
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection

  • Method Details

    • getItem

      public MenuItem getItem(int itemId)
      Given an item id returns the object holding its MenuItem
      Parameters:
      itemId -
      Returns:

    • printAllItems

      public String printAllItems()
      Returns list as formatted string. Used only in debugging
      Returns:
      formatted string

    • createItem

      public void createItem(Connection connection, String itemName, double itemPrice, String itemType, String status)
      Given a database connection and item properties. Generates a row entry in the menu
      Parameters:
      connection - Databse connection
      itemName - New item's name
      itemPrice - New item's price
      itemType - New item's type
      status - New item's status

    • deleteItem

      public void deleteItem(Connection connection, int itemId)
      Given a database connection and item id: Delete the row entry with the related itemid

      Do not use this method

      Parameters:
      connection - Database Connection
      itemId - Unique id of the row to be deleted

    • updateItemName

      public void updateItemName(Connection connection, int itemId, String itemName)
      Given a databse connection, item id, and new name, update the related row entry to have the new name
      Parameters:
      connection - Database Connection
      itemId - Unique id of item to update
      itemName - New name of item after update

    • updateItemPrice

      public void updateItemPrice(Connection connection, int itemId, double itemPrice)
      Given a databse connection, unique item identifier, and new price. Update price
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      itemId - Unique identifier of item to update
      itemPrice - Float value of new price after item update

    • updateItemType

      public void updateItemType(Connection connection, int itemId, String itemType)
      Given a database connection, item id, and item type. Update the related item with the new item type
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      itemId - Unqiue item identifier of the item to update
      itemType - New type after item update

    • updateActiveItems

      public void updateActiveItems(int itemId, boolean active)
      Method to update active status of local items
      Parameters:
      itemId - Unique identifier of item to update
      active - True for Active, False for Inactive

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(Connection connection, int itemId, boolean active)
      Given a database connection, item id, and a boolean: Update row with matching id
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      itemId - item_id value in row to update
      active - True for Active, False for inactive

    • getUniqueItemTypes

      public List<String> getUniqueItemTypes(Connection connection)
      Used to create segments for each different item type in the menu
      Parameters:
      connection - Database Connection
      Returns:
      List object holding one entry for each unique item type found in the menu items

    • getActiveItems

      public List<MenuItem> getActiveItems()
      Used to display in cashier view, otherwise it could show inactive items
      Returns:
      Returns a list of only the items holding active status
